title: synthesize-collection-output
description: Cross-paper evidence synthesis for a clinical question (working synthesis, not formal SR)

clinical_question.description: Focused clinical question being synthesized, ideally in PICO/PIO/PIRD format

number_of_studies.description: Total number of studies included in the synthesis

study_designs_summary.description: Counts of studies per design type (keys are study_type values from extract-pico)

risk_of_bias.description: Summary RoB judgment (tool-specific summary, e.g., 'low' for ROB 2, 'NOS 7/9' for cohort)

magnitude_consistency.description: Are effect sizes broadly similar or do they vary substantially?

explanations_for_discordance.description: Plausible factors explaining differences across studies (population, intervention, methodology, era, funding)

rationale.description: Justification for the GRADE-style certainty: starting level, downgrades, upgrades

risk_of_bias_distribution.description: Free-text summary of RoB distribution across the body of evidence

evidence_gaps.description: Populations, outcomes, comparators, settings, or methodological gaps

supported.description: What the body of evidence supports doing

not_supported.description: What the body of evidence supports not doing or stopping

requires_individualization.description: Decisions that depend on patient-level factors not consistently addressed

high_priority_research.description: Where additional studies would most change practice

synthesis_confidence.description: Overall confidence in the synthesis output (independent of GRADE certainty of evidence)

synthesis_notes.description: Free-text notes about the synthesis process, caveats, or limitations of this output
